title: Rules of default applicable except as specified
doc_html:
§135.  Rules of default applicable except as specified

The provisions of the Louisiana Civil Code concerning putting in default are applicable to mineral leases subject to the following modifications.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §135, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
